pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py define this as the explicit synthetic target configuration value.
Task instructions and verifier.py define this as the explicit synthetic target configuration value.
Environment setup scripts (scripts/setup_artifactory.sh, scripts/task_utils.sh) explicitly configure 'admin' as the default admin username.
Environment setup scripts (scripts/setup_artifactory.sh, scripts/task_utils.sh) explicitly configure 'password' as the default admin password.
Environment setup scripts (scripts/setup_artifactory.sh, scripts/task_utils.sh) explicitly set http://localhost:8082 as the Artifactory UI URL.

privileged_info_summary: The environment runs JFrog Artifactory at http://localhost:8082 with default credentials (admin / password), as confirmed by the environment's setup scripts. The task requires configuring the system's Custom Base URL to 'https://artifacts.acme-corp.io' and the File Upload Max Size to 500 MB, which are synthetic target values defined in the task configuration and verifier.
